race.description: Sportsbet Nobody Does It Easier Maiden Plate
race.comment: APADANA (9) returns and makes her stable debut. Turned in some solid efforts in her debut prep before spelling and now finds a nice race to kick things off on the right note. HELLISH LEE (11) went forward in a positive change of tactics at Ararat and fought hard in the lane to hold third. Drawn much kinder this time and gets in well with the 2kg claim. Can get off the mark this time. FEARLESS MONARCH (3) mixes her form but has peaks that can measure up in this thin maiden. Has proven versatile with her speed, so interesting to see what they do from the wide draw. LIBBY ANN (5) looked close to breaking through before a flat effort last time. Backs up quickly and is worth another chance.
